series_metadata.series_title: Auctioneer Program Investigations, Administrative Hearings, and Criminal and Civil Court Records
series_metadata.series_description: The records contain the agency''s investigations of potential violations of administrative rules or the ORC for the auctioneer program. The records may include but are not limited to, case investigative summaries, initial complaint, referral form, depositions, notices of opportunity of hearing letters, letters of instruction, administrative or criminal hearing notices, settlement agreements, hearing officer''s report and recommendations, hearing transcripts, recovery fund claims, and director''s orders.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: final adjudication ; Paper: final adjudication
